name: Marble Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Mix graham cracker crumbs and sugar in a bowl.
3. Stir in melted margarine until combined.
4. Add vanilla extract and press mixture into a greased springform pan.
5. Bake for 15-20 minutes or until lightly browned.
6. Remove from oven and let cool slightly.
7. Spread softened cream cheese over the crust, mashing it to fill any gaps.
8. Melt the unsweetened chocolate and stir into the filling.
9. Chill the cheesecake in the refrigerator for at least 4 hours before serving.
10. Turn off the heat when finished baking and allow cooling completely before chilling.
